quests.name: Daily Silence Slayer: Bonelight Choristers
quests.description: Bonelight choristers process through the ossuary. Silence their hymn.

quests.name: Daily Silence Slayer: Mute Sentries
quests.description: Mute sentries guard the Hall of Refusal. Break their vigil.

quests.name: Daily Silence Slayer: Drowned Choristers
quests.description: Drowned choristers echo through the refrain. End their song.

quests.name: Daily Silence Slayer: Held Notes
quests.description: Held notes hang in the interval, refusing to fade. Cut them short.
